final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing GPT-5.5, featuring Sam Altman as the speaker.

Style/medium: needs a "国内GP路演" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 红杉中国 pitch deck visual systems, 高瓴资本 annual report design language, 2010s Chinese tech unicorn IPO roadshow collateral; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a horizontal PPT cover layout with speaker name placement and event title hierarchy
Subject: must include Sam Altman as the designated speaker
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, high-stakes investment atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (event/announcement title), "奥特曼" (speaker name)
Constraints: must conform to Chinese domestic roadshow conventions and GP-tier professional standards
Avoid:
